feedback: Your app keeps crashing every time I try to checkout. I've lost my cart 3 times now. This is extremely frustrating and I'm considering switching to a competitor.
The new dashboard is clean and easy to navigate. Loved the dark mode update! Would be nice to have export to PDF though.
Delivery was 2 weeks late and customer support never responded to my 3 emails. Very disappointed with the service.
Onboarding was smooth and the UI is pretty intuitive. Minor issue: the date picker doesn't work well on mobile.
